evals.prompt: Review this Product0 brief; it never defines what happens when delivery permanently fails.
evals.expected_output: The reviewer returns NOT_READY, identifies missing product-visible failure/recovery behavior, names the section to revise, and routes back to product design or requirements.

evals.prompt: The brief is complete except for the queue technology.
evals.expected_output: The reviewer may return HANDOFF_READY because queue technology is an explicitly open technical question, provided no product behavior depends on an unresolved answer.
